texto: She was a former Texan - proud, loud and stubborn. But you can't really be a former Texan. You can only move out of Texas. To be a former Texan would be like growing up in Italy, moving out and being formerly Italian.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeffrey Michelson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “She was a former Texan - proud, loud and stubborn. But you can't really be a former Texan. You ca…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, humorous, former pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
